evolutionSummary:
Project evolution summary (≤200 words):

This cycle processed 108 issues and 38 PRs, resolving key bugs and expanding device support. A major milestone is the discovery of 1,042 new fingerprints, with 10 top community-reported FPs (e.g., _TZ3000_vd43bbfq + TS0203/TS0207/TS0044/TS0201/TS0222/TS0202/TS0101/DS01/RH3001/RH3040) successfully mapped and integrated. These additions strengthen coverage across Tuya device variants. Multiple legacy drivers were updated to fix startup and pairing issues, improving stability for BSEED and battery-powered sensors. Action items include completing diagnostics for remaining pending devices, reinforcing passive-mode registration for sleepy TS02xx/TS004x sensors to prevent "56 years ago" failures, and validating new DP mappings for energy and climate devices. The project also advanced automation with nightly processing and proactive forum engagement, reducing manual triage. Continued focus on SDK3 compliance, driver integrity, and community feedback ensures sustainable growth. Next steps: finalize pending diagnostics, re-pair affected devices, and monitor edge-case reports for further refinements.
